Name: AGameModeBase
Description:
The GameModeBase defines the game being played. It governs the game rules, scoring, what actors
  are allowed to exist in this game type, and who may enter the game.
 
  It is only instanced on the server and will never exist on the client. 
 
  A GameModeBase actor is instantiated when the level is initialized for gameplay in
  C++ UGameEngine::LoadMap().  
  
  The class of this GameMode actor is determined by (in order) either the URL ?game=xxx, 
  the GameMode Override value set in the World Settings, or the DefaultGameMode entry set 
  in the game's Project Settings.

Variables.Name: OptionsString
Variables.Description: Save options string and parse it when needed

Variables.Name: GameSessionClass
Variables.Description: Class of GameSession, which handles login approval and online game interface

Variables.Name: GameStateClass
Variables.Description: Class of GameState associated with this GameMode.

Variables.Name: PlayerControllerClass
Variables.Description: The class of PlayerController to spawn for players logging in.

Variables.Name: PlayerStateClass
Variables.Description: A PlayerState of this class will be associated with every player to replicate relevant player information to all clients.

Variables.Name: DefaultPawnClass
Variables.Description: The default pawn class used by players.

Variables.Name: SpectatorClass
Variables.Description: The pawn class used by the PlayerController for players when spectating.

Variables.Name: ReplaySpectatorPlayerControllerClass
Variables.Description: The PlayerController class used when spectating a network replay.

Variables.Name: GameSession
Variables.Description: Game Session handles login approval, arbitration, online game interface

Variables.Name: GameState
Variables.Description: GameState is used to replicate game state relevant properties to all clients.

Variables.Name: DefaultPlayerName
Variables.Description: The default player name assigned to players that join with no name specified.

Variables.Name: bUseSeamlessTravel
Variables.Description: Whether the game perform map travels using SeamlessTravel() which loads in the background and doesn't disconnect clients

Variables.Name: bStartPlayersAsSpectators
Variables.Description: Whether players should immediately spawn when logging in, or stay as spectators until they manually spawn

Functions.Name: GetDefaultPawnClassForController
Functions.Description: Returns default pawn class for given controller

Functions.Name: GetNumPlayers
Functions.Description: Returns number of active human players, excluding spectators

Functions.Name: GetNumSpectators
Functions.Description: Returns number of human players currently spectating

Functions.Name: StartPlay
Functions.Description: Transitions to calls BeginPlay on actors.

Functions.Name: HasMatchStarted
Functions.Description: Returns true if the match start callbacks have been called

Functions.Name: ShouldReset
Functions.Description:
Overridable function to determine whether an Actor should have Reset called when the game has Reset called on it.
	  Default implementation returns true

Params.Name: ActorToReset
Params.Description: The actor to make a determination for

Return.Description: true if ActorToReset should have Reset() called on it while restarting the game,

Functions.Name: ResetLevel
Functions.Description:
Overridable function called when resetting level. This is used to reset the game state while staying in the same map
	  Default implementation calls Reset() on all actors except GameMode and Controllers

Functions.Name: ReturnToMainMenuHost
Functions.Description: Return to main menu, and disconnect any players

Functions.Name: K2_PostLogin
Functions.Description: Notification that a player has successfully logged in, and has been given a player controller

Functions.Name: K2_OnLogout
Functions.Description: Implementable event when a Controller with a PlayerState leaves the game.

Functions.Name: HandleStartingNewPlayer
Functions.Description: Signals that a player is ready to enter the game, which may start it up

Functions.Name: MustSpectate
Functions.Description: Returns true if NewPlayerController may only join the server as a spectator.

Functions.Name: CanSpectate
Functions.Description: Return whether Viewer is allowed to spectate from the point of view of ViewTarget.

Functions.Name: ChangeName
Functions.Description: Sets the name for a controller

Params.Name: Controller
Params.Description: The controller of the player to change the name of

Params.Name: NewName
Params.Description: The name to set the player to

Params.Name: bNameChange
Params.Description: Whether the name is changing or if this is the first time it has been set

Functions.Name: K2_OnChangeName
Functions.Description: Overridable event for GameMode blueprint to respond to a change name call

Params.Name: NewName
Params.Description: The name to set the player to

Params.Name: bNameChange
Params.Description: Whether the name is changing or if this is the first time it has been set

Functions.Name: ChoosePlayerStart
Functions.Description:
Return the 'best' player start for this player to spawn from
	  Default implementation looks for a random unoccupied spot

Params.Name: Player
Params.Description: is the controller for whom we are choosing a playerstart

Return.Description: AActor chosen as player start (usually a PlayerStart)

Functions.Name: FindPlayerStart
Functions.Description:
Return the specific player start actor that should be used for the next spawn
	  This will either use a previously saved startactor, or calls ChoosePlayerStart

Params.Name: Player
Params.Description: The AController for whom we are choosing a Player Start

Params.Name: IncomingName
Params.Description: Specifies the tag of a Player Start to use

Return.Description: Actor chosen as player start (usually a PlayerStart)

Functions.Name: K2_FindPlayerStart
Functions.Description:
Return the specific player start actor that should be used for the next spawn
	  This will either use a previously saved startactor, or calls ChoosePlayerStart

Params.Name: Player
Params.Description: The AController for whom we are choosing a Player Start

Params.Name: IncomingName
Params.Description: Specifies the tag of a Player Start to use

Return.Description: Actor chosen as player start (usually a PlayerStart)

Functions.Name: PlayerCanRestart
Functions.Description: Returns true if it's valid to call RestartPlayer. By default will call Player->CanRestartPlayer

Functions.Name: RestartPlayer
Functions.Description: Tries to spawn the player's pawn, at the location returned by FindPlayerStart

Functions.Name: RestartPlayerAtPlayerStart
Functions.Description: Tries to spawn the player's pawn at the specified actor's location

Functions.Name: RestartPlayerAtTransform
Functions.Description: Tries to spawn the player's pawn at a specific location

Functions.Name: SpawnDefaultPawnFor
Functions.Description: Called during RestartPlayer to actually spawn the player's pawn, when using a start spot

Params.Name: NewPlayer
Params.Description: - Controller for whom this pawn is spawned

Params.Name: StartSpot
Params.Description: - Actor at which to spawn pawn

Return.Description: a pawn of the default pawn class

Functions.Name: SpawnDefaultPawnAtTransform
Functions.Description: Called during RestartPlayer to actually spawn the player's pawn, when using a transform

Params.Name: NewPlayer
Params.Description: - Controller for whom this pawn is spawned

Return.Description: a pawn of the default pawn class

Functions.Name: InitStartSpot
Functions.Description: Called from RestartPlayerAtPlayerStart, can be used to initialize the start spawn actor

Functions.Name: K2_OnRestartPlayer
Functions.Description: Implementable event called at the end of RestartPlayer

Functions.Name: InitializeHUDForPlayer
Functions.Description: Initialize the AHUD object for a player. Games can override this to do something different

Functions.Name: K2_OnSwapPlayerControllers
Functions.Description: Called when a PlayerController is swapped to a new one during seamless travel
